title: Execution Approach
intro: A disciplined five-stage methodology — from first brief to white-glove handover.

steps.title: Brief & Discovery
steps.description: Site walkthrough, stakeholder alignment, programme definition, and budget band confirmation.

steps.title: Concept & Design Development
steps.description: Spatial planning, material palettes, 3D visualization, and BOQ preparation aligned to buildability.

steps.title: Technical Documentation
steps.description: Working drawings, MEP coordination, vendor specifications, and procurement schedules.

steps.title: Turnkey Execution
steps.description: Site leadership, civil & fit-out, quality controls, and daily progress reporting.

steps.title: Snag, Handover & Aftercare
steps.description: Commissioning, snag close-out, documentation, and post-handover support.
